# Public corpus for ``recon fingerprints test <slug>``.
#
# 40 well-known apex domains across the big detection classes. All are
# public, widely-visible companies; every domain here was picked so the
# fingerprint catalog has a reasonable chance of firing *something* on
# it. Contributors can point at a larger or more specialized corpus
# with ``--corpus path/to/file``.
#
# Keep this list stable. Adding or removing domains invalidates
# fixture-pinning in tests and produces churn in "test" command
# output that isn't tied to actual fingerprint changes.

# Big tech
apple.com
microsoft.com
google.com
amazon.com
meta.com
netflix.com

# Major SaaS
stripe.com
shopify.com
atlassian.com
slack.com
zoom.us
hubspot.com
salesforce.com
docusign.com

# Retail / consumer
walmart.com
costco.com
starbucks.com
target.com
nike.com
patagonia.com

# Automotive / industrial
toyota.com
ford.com
tesla.com
boeing.com
siemens.com

# Finance / insurance
jpmorganchase.com
visa.com
mastercard.com

# Media / entertainment
nytimes.com
cnn.com
spotify.com
reddit.com

# Health / pharma
pfizer.com
cvshealth.com

# International
sap.com
lvmh.com
unilever.com
nestle.com
